name: Cockpit
summary: Local-first control plane for SSH-reachable hosts. The chat agent, the HTTP backplane, and the browser UI are three faces on one local state directory (~/.cockpit/). One operator drives N remote machines from this terminal; nothing leaves the box.
tagline: One terminal. N continuums. Zero leaks.

host.description: Host alias (e.g. 'rappter1') or IP / hostname for ping/discover.

user.description: SSH user when adding a host.

address.description: SSH address (DNS, IPv4, or IPv6 with %iface) when adding a host.

access_note: This rapplication's source files live in the kody-w/RAPP_Store_Private repository. Without read access, every singleton_url / ui_url / organ_url returns HTTP 404 and the rapplication does nothing. With access (a PAT with read on the private repo, or `gh auth token` configured), the URLs return 200 and the singleton drops into your brainstem normally. Public discovery, private substance.

surfaces.organ: organs/cockpit_organ.py — local HTTP backplane on 127.0.0.1, host-header rebind guard
surfaces.ui: ui/index.html — browser cockpit, talks to the organ
